profile.name: Wade Wilson
profile.tagline: Innovative & collaborative senior technology leader, specialist in connecting technical teams with core business operations

role.title: Head of Digital and Technology
role.description: Thank you for considering my application to join your team at Truescape. This role speaks to exactly what I love to do, and do well. I've put together this CV companion to identify how I can add value to Truescape right away.

experience.title: Technology Strategy and Pipeline Ownership
experience.summary: Defining what gets built, bought or retired - and in what order - to move the business forward
bullets: Built and executed a multi-year technology roadmap at First Security, retiring legacy systems and integrating platforms across a 2,000-staff operation
Consolidated a fragmented technology stack into efficient, connected platforms delivering measurable operational improvements
Balanced a forward-looking pipeline with day-to-day platform stability and business continuity

quote.text: His business, managerial and technical insights are outstanding. The organisation has transformed under his leadership from using slow disparate systems to efficient and integrated platforms.
quote.author: Tony Vanderburg, Program Manager, Wilson Group

experience.title: Project Delivery - from concept to reality
experience.summary: Taking initiatives from a problem statement through to an embedded, adopted solution
bullets: Designed and delivered WelfareFIRST from internal solution to commercial product with 4,500+ contracted users
Led ground-up development of an award-winning iOS and Android mobile app unlocking a new B2C revenue stream
Delivered custom software solution credited as a key factor in retaining a major government contract by tender

quote.text: Wade brings a unique ability: he can envision a future state combining existing off-the-shelf functionality from multiple solutions with integration, custom development, process and most importantly, people. Furthermore, he possesses the project and people management skills to deliver a finished product that drives real value and commercial success.
quote.author: Boyd Peacock, Founder and CEO GetHomeSafe (long-time software partner, white-labeled platform)

experience.title: Leading data-driven decision making
experience.summary: Building the information capability that turns operational data into actionable insights for leaders and customers.
bullets: Built our organisation's first data warehouse, consolidating data from all operational and functional platforms into a single source
Delivered a full Power BI reporting suite covering advanced operational and financial performance analytics across a 2,000-staff business
Upskilled operational leaders through workshops, one-to-one coaching and gamified learning modules to build data literacy and confidence

quote.text: Under Wade’s leadership, the team helped democratise data across the organisation, making insights more accessible and enabling better, faster decision-making. They also delivered a true measure of service performance, giving us a clearer understanding of how we were performing for our customers and allowing us to proactively identify issues and adjust where needed.
quote.author: Jemima Briggs, as General Manager of Sales, FIRST Security

experience.title: Driving automation, innovation & efficiency
experience.summary: Removing cost, time and effort through smarter systems and process design, and practical implementation of new technology.
bullets: Replaced fully manual welfare monitoring process, eliminating $240k+ p/a in costs
Personally built a custom pricing web app using vibe-coding to a production standard, with around 85% reduction in development time
Delivered 30% improvement in rostering efficiency through modern scheduling platform with integrated payroll

personal qualities.title: Understanding how to connect technology to the wider business
personal qualities.summary: I have the ability to translate technical concepts into commercial outcomes, and business needs into clear technical direction.
bullets: Developed 3-year product strategy adopted at board level
Created market analysis frameworks used across the organisation
Led competitive positioning that secured key enterprise wins

quote.text: He always held us to a high standard, but it was always about making sure the end result worked well in the real world and took account of business, commercial, people, change, and technical realities.
quote.author: Jonathan Clarke, Director, Sandfield Associates [Software Development Partner]

personal qualities.title: Commercial and strategic leadership
personal qualities.summary: I assess technology investment based on business value, with the discipline to prioritise what matters most.
bullets: Regular speaker at industry conferences and internal all-hands
Authored product blog with 10,000+ monthly readers
Created stakeholder update process adopted company-wide

quote.author: Tim Covic, as Chief Executive Officer of FIRST Security

personal qualities.title: Brings clarity in complex environments
personal qualities.summary: I provide structure and direction where ambiguity would otherwise stall delivery.

quote.text: Wade's got a very solid technical head on his shoulders combined with very good judgement, but what I appreciated most was his ability to consistently make a quality call. He doesn't need to overthink things and he makes practical, fast decisions and keeps the momentum going.
quote.author: Jonathan Clarke, Director, Sandfield Associates [Software Development Partner]

personal qualities.title: Able to communicate and influence at all levels
personal qualities.summary: I pride myself on building respectful, trusting relationshps with colleagues in technical, operational and leadership roles.
bullets: Mentored 5 junior PMs, 3 now in senior roles
Created PM competency framework and training programme
Maintained 95% team retention over 4 years

quote.text: As part of his senior role, he has needed to communicate at all levels (Field staff to Group CEOs) to drive the company strategy, operational delivery to our clients, and be responsive to the ever-changing landscape working within our complex environment.
quote.author: Steven Sullivan, as Chief Operating Officer of FIRST Security
